chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2516 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.10825/2021 2. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Din Qazi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General It is jointly submitted that in view of order dated 02.10.2024, the petition may be disposed of for the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
